## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan the structure for an upcoming workshop on AI prompting and workflow creation.](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Decided to focus on practical, hands-on examples using Anthropic's console for the workshop](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Will cover key concepts like chain of thought, few-shot learning, and system vs. user prompts](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Plan to walk through building/improving specific workflows (e.g., call feature request analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Aim to balance theory (30 mins) with practical application for better engagement](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

## Topics

### Workshop Structure and Content

  - [Quick 15-min recap at start; gather participant feedback on expectations](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [15-30 mins of prompting theory, including:](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [System vs. user prompts](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [Chain of thought reasoning](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
      - [Few-shot learning and example importance](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Hands-on practice using Anthropic's console](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [Walk through specific workflow examples (e.g., call feature request analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
      - [Explain prompt construction and reasoning behind choices](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Custom GPT demonstration (brief)](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Links to additional resources for self-study](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

### Workflow Examples to Cover

  - [Call feature request analysis](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
      - [Using real transcripts from Deep Primary](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
      - [Demonstrating input formatting and prompt structure](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Movie character blog post rewrite](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [Showcases multiple input types (screen article, character research, quotes)](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - Potentially: Job description writing focusing on product manager qualities

### Prompt Engineering Techniques

  - [Emphasize thoughtful role definition in prompts](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [Go beyond basic descriptors (e.g., "SEO expert")](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [Include relevant experience, skills, and thinking frameworks](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Demonstrate how to use AI to generate examples for few-shot learning](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Explain Anthropic's built-in chain of thought output in console responses](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Tool Comparisons and Observations

  - [Noted reliability issues with some competitor products despite significant funding](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Discussed potential infrastructure/scaling challenges faced by cloud-dependent companies](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Anthropic console improvements:](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [New "Improve an existing prompt" feature](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [Automatic workflow breakdown into steps (flowchart, draft, polish, review, organize)](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize workshop slide deck, ensuring a balance of theory and hands-on content](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Prepare specific workflow examples in Anthropic console for live demonstration](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Create links to additional resources for participant self-study after the workshop](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Test and familiarize with any new Anthropic console features before the workshop](https://fathom.video/share/wD6D82y-PnE6NxEenyxt3_ZJph376xi6?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
